reviews.comment:
Fuimos a cargar nafta hoy 14/01/22 12:30 el empleado muy amable nos limpio los vidrios le dejamos propina ( el empleado flaco de unos 60 años y narigon) nos cobra $3900 no los da factura y NO NOS CARGO NAFTA!!! NOS ROBO LA PLATA A MI Y A LA EMPRESA LLEGUE A QUILMES CON 5 LITROS!!! TENGO EL COMPROBANTE DE LA OTRA ESTACION DE SERVICIO.
ME PODRIA HABER QUEDADO TIRADO X FALTA DE NAFTA Y NO SABIA XQ !!
ENCIMA DE LADRON MALA PERSONA. IGUAL NO VA A QUEDAR ACA ASI QUE FIJENSE CUANDO CARGAN NAFTA AHI O EN OTRO LADO

(Translated by Google)
We went to get gas today, January 14, 2022, at 12:30 PM. The employee was very friendly, cleaned our windows, and we gave him a tip (the employee was thin, around 60 years old, and had a big nose). He charged us $3900, didn't give us a receipt, and DIDN'T FILL US WITH GAS!!! He STOLE MONEY FROM ME AND THE COMPANY. I ARRIVED IN QUILMES WITH 5 LITERS!!! I HAVE THE RECEIPT FROM THE OTHER GAS STATION.
I COULD HAVE BEEN STRANDED FOR LACK OF GAS AND I DIDN'T EVEN KNOW WHY!!
ON TOP OF BEING A THIEF, HE'S A BAD PERSON. THIS ISN'T GOING TO STAY HERE, SO BE CAREFUL WHEN YOU FILL UP WITH GAS THERE OR ANYWHERE ELSE.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtdi0yNEVnEAE

reviews.comment:
YPF siempre fue lo mejor, en todo sentido, desde el combustible hasta comprar un simple caramelo. El 26/12/2021  no puedo opinar lo mismo, llovía mucho, las escobillas de la camioneta, con el viento y la lluvia, se aflojaron,  se rompieron y no podía continuar así, paré en YPF y no tenían de repuesto escobillas (ecosport).  Una lástima!!!

(Translated by Google)
YPF has always been the best, in every way, from fuel to buying a simple candy. On December 26, 2021, I can't say the same. It was raining heavily, and the wind and rain loosened the windshield wipers on my SUV, breaking them. I couldn't continue driving like that, so I stopped at YPF, but they didn't have replacement wiper blades (for my EcoSport). What a shame!

reviews.comment:
Excelente parada para descansar y disfrutar un rato durante un viaje largo.
Cuenta con espacios verdes para niños y para sentarse a comer y relajar.
Tiene un restaurant propio del ACA para socios para comer muy cómodamente. Y también el típico local de YPF con venta de comestibles y también café y pastelería.
La atención es buena y la relación precio calidad es buena.

(Translated by Google)
An excellent stop to rest and enjoy a while during a long trip.
It has green spaces for children and places to sit, eat, and relax.
It has its own ACA restaurant for members, offering a comfortable meal. There's also the typical YPF station with groceries, coffee, and pastries.
The service is good, and the price-quality ratio is good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNteTgybEp3EAE
